topics.title: George Takei and Promotional Products

topics.title: Mel Gibson Interview and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses Mel Gibson’s appearance on Jay Leno, the complexities of guest appearances on late-night talk shows, and recent news regarding Nicole Richie.

topics.title: Studio Cleanup and Football Pool Results
topics.summary: The studio addresses a mess created by spilled coffee on equipment and discusses the current standings of a football pool before transitioning into a discussion about Gwen Stefani.

topics.title: Celebrity Commentary and Fight Stories

topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Media Challenges
topics.summary: The show discusses the rapid growth of satellite radio subscribers, the perceived smear campaigns against its success, and the technical and financial complexities of launching new broadcasting infrastructure.

topics.title: David Letterman and Artie Lange Weight Comparison
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding David Letterman's television career and a weight-guessing game involving Artie Lange.

topics.title: Weight Comparisons and Guest Interviews

topics.title: Prank Calls and Celebrity Interactions

topics.title: Prank Calls and Celebrity Interactions

topics.title: Radio Pranks and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio explores past radio pranks involving Jerry Lewis and Larry King, discusses a celebrity arrest for reckless driving, and previews upcoming guests.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Updates

topics.title: Pop Culture, Celebrity News, and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including the commercialization of eccentric artists, celebrity childhoods, media portrayals of beauty, legal issues involving public figures, and recent news regarding a military coup in Fiji.
